rulings.Case Title: PAUL ANDREW SPIEGEL VS. JOHN E. WAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Tiffany R. Norman And Brett Gibbs Of Trn Law Associates From Representing Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 23, 2023 line . CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL SPIEGEL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Tiffany R. Norman And Brett Gibbs Of Trn Law Associates From Representing Defendant is continued to March 30, 2023 per stipulation of the parties. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ZHIJUN WU VS. JIANBO ZHONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Defendant Zhijun Wus Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 23, 2023 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT ZHIJUN WU Cross-Defendant Zhijun Wus Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege facts: (1) underlying an agency relationship between Wu and Huang, (2) underlying the discovery of the fraud, common counts, and conspiracy causes of action; and (3) that the account was a book account. These factual allegations are to be included in a bold font in the amended cross-complaint. Cross-Complainant shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended cross-complaint. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Case Title: MAGDY TAWADROUS ET AL VS. JENI GAMBLE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One, As To Defendants Jeni Gamble And Murray Agnew
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 23, 2023 line 5. PLAINTIFF MAGDY TAWADROUS, HANY TAWADROUS, CHRISTINE TAWADROUS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One, As To Defendants Jeni Gamble And Murray Agnew is GRANTED. Defendants failed to seek a protective order to limit the number of requests. The objections based on attorney client privilege, taxpayer privilege and financial privacy are overruled. The Motion granted and Defendants shall serve responses without objections within 10 days. Sanctions against the Defendant and Defendants' counsel in the amount of $1,845 are also granted. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MAGDY TAWADROUS ET AL VS. JENI GAMBLE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, As To Defendants Jeni Gamble And Murray Agnew
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 23, 2023 line 5. PLAINTIFF MAGDY TAWADROUS, HANY TAWADROUS, CHRISTINE TAWADROUS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, As To Defendants Jeni Gamble And Murray Agnew is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART as follows: Defendants' responses to Form Interrogatory 17.1 as to RFAs 1-35 are adequate. Defendants' failure to respond as to RFAs 36-50 is not justified. Defendants' are to provide responses without objections within 10 days.
